name: Pepper Steak Strips
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Round Steak, cut in strips - 1/8 inch thick by 3 inches long
1 each Med Green Pepper - seeded and cut into strips
8 oz (1 Can) Mushrooms, drained - stems and pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the marinade as directed on the envelope.
2. Marinate beef as directed on the envelope; drain well.
3. Cover and microwave onion and margarine in a 2-quart casserole on high (100%) for 1 minute. Stir in bouquet sauce, tomatoes, and thyme.
4. Mix in beef. Cover and microwave for 8 minutes; stir.
5. Microwave on medium (50%) for 10 minutes.
6. Shake flour and wine in a tightly covered container. Stir into meat mixture.
7. Add pepper strips and mushrooms; mix into sauce. Cover and microwave until meat is tender, about 6 to 8 minutes.
8. Serve over hot Rice.
